title: hyptis fallax
intro: Hyptis fallax, also known as False Hyptis, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hyptis fallax include its ability to relieve symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate skin irritations. Hyptis fallax can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
